prompt: Quiz-night standings keep coming out scrambled and it's making the league look amateur. Last week the board showed a 31-point team above a 52-point team; the week before it looked fine, so whatever it is only bites for some line-ups. Tie handling is wrong too — the rules say a points tie goes to whichever team handed their sheet in first, but ties are landing in what looks like whatever order the entries arrived. podium() and positionOf() inherit the same nonsense, so the wrong teams are getting the bar tab prize. `node --test test_standings.ts` reproduces all of it with real-ish nights. Fix standings.ts; the tests are the spec, leave them alone.
